task_description: Port the shell-based init sequence from k3os repo (overlay/init, overlay/libexec/k3os/*) into Go code within k3os-bin. The shell scripts handle bootstrap, mode detection, mode-specific setup, boot finalization, and handoff to OpenRC. Each phase becomes a Go package under internal/boot/ with interface-driven design for testability using TDD.

verification.summary: go build ./... clean, go test ./... all pass (finalize 48 tests, boot orchestrator 10 tests, bootstrap 18 tests, modes tests), golangci-lint 0 issues. Tests exercise real code paths through mocked interfaces with proper success+error coverage.
